title: SDIP Conformance Test Suite
description: Test queries with known-correct doctrinal positions for fidelity verification.

judge_model.description: Recommended model for judging test outputs (LLM-as-judge). If absent, the harness uses the node's own model for self-evaluation.

query.description: The query to send to the node.

must_affirm.description: Doctrinal positions the response must affirm (substring/semantic match).

must_not_affirm.description: Doctrinal positions the response must not affirm.

must_cite_from.description: Corpus files at least one of which must appear in the retrieval signature for this query.

must_use_terminology.description: Glossary terms that must appear in the response.

must_not_use_terminology.description: Terms that signal failure (e.g., hedge words for canon-register tests).

severity.description: Critical failures fail the overall suite; major and minor are counted but don't fail.
